name: bentoo-dev
description: Develop and maintain Gentoo ebuilds and overlays — create, edit, bump, clean, and QA-validate packages with specialized subagents.

maintainer_email.title: Maintainer email
maintainer_email.description: Default <email> in metadata.xml for new packages.

maintainer_name.title: Maintainer name
maintainer_name.description: Default <name> in metadata.xml for new packages.

maintainer_type.title: Maintainer type (person|project|nobody)
maintainer_type.description: Value of the type= attribute on <maintainer> in metadata.xml.

default_keywords.title: Default KEYWORDS for new ebuilds
default_keywords.description: KEYWORDS string used when creating new ebuilds (e.g. '~amd64' or '~amd64 ~arm64').

preferred_overlay_path.title: Preferred overlay path
preferred_overlay_path.description: Optional default overlay path; auto-detected if empty.
